SEQUENCE.COMMENT: z_checkCMADate - format a CMADate string and, for accessed dates, check if the date needs updating
the input date is optional - if supplied, it is assumed to be an accessed date - if it is an accessed date, then it is tested to see if it
is 90 days old or older, and then if so, a new date is returned - if the input date is NOT supplied, then a new date is simply returned

record.value: this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update
this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update
this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update
this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update

record.name: type
record.value: this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update
this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update

MAP.COMMENT: sCMADate = left(sCMADate, 10) extract just the yyyy-MM-dd portion

record.value: this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update
this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update
this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update
this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update
this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update
this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update

SEQUENCE.NAME: %sCurdate% > %resultDate%
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if the current date is beyond 90 days from the supplied CMADate, then we need to update it

record.value: this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update

record.name: type
record.value: this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update
this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update
this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update

this is an optional field that, if supplied, will result in a potential update
